answers.answer: B) CREATE INDEX idx ON orders(customer_id, status, created_at DESC). This composite index covers all three operations: filter by customer_id (first), filter by status within that customer (second), and return results sorted by created_at DESC (third) without extra sorting.

Core WebhookManager implementation:

Types:
- WebhookSubscription { id, url, events[], secret, enabled, consecutiveFailures }
- DeliveryAttempt { webhookId, event, payload, timestamp, success, responseCode, durationMs, error }

Key methods:
1. register(url, events, secret) - creates subscription with UUID
2. deliver(event, payload) - finds subscribed endpoints, delivers in parallel
3. signPayload(payload, secret) - HMAC-SHA256 signature
4. deliverToSubscriber(sub, event, payload) - HTTP POST with signature header, handles timeout(10s), logs result
5. scheduleRetry(sub, event, payload) - exponential backoff: 1m, 5m, 15m, 1h, 4h (max 5 retries over 24h)
6. healthCheck(webhookId) - GET request to verify connectivity
7. On 10 consecutive failures: disable endpoint

Retry logic uses backoff array [60000, 300000, 900000, 3600000, 14400000]ms. All attempts logged.
